#OTD On April 15, 1969, North Korea shot down a US Navy EC-121 reconnaissance plane over the Sea of Japan. All 31 crew members died. Despite the provocation, the Nixon administration chose a naval show of force over military retaliation to avoid a new war during the Vietnam conflict.
